title: The Straw Hats Turn the Raid Around
description: On pages 6–9, this part focuses on Unknown person #5, Black Maria, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7, Robin, Unknown person #8 as The raid enters decisive Straw Hat and alliance battles while Yamato confronts Kaido and Momonosuke struggles to become Wano’s hope.
scene: The raid enters decisive Straw Hat and alliance battles while Yamato confronts Kaido and Momonosuke struggles to become Wano’s hope.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Taste my Oran Knuckles!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: OG!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Argh!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Ahahaha, what a sats- fyingly large punching bag!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: OH MY!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Now you're the one trying to get away?

dialogue.speaker: Black Maria
dialogue.text: Maria Cage!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He he he he he he he he he he he he he he he he he he he he he he he he he he he he he he he he he he he he he he he he he he he he he he he he he he he he he he he he he he he he he he he

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: By the way, my web is flammable. :)

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: fwoosh

dialogue.speaker: Black Maria
dialogue.text: Maria Kindling!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I seem to recall you saying this would be settled quickly!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This is what you get for defending that disgrace, "Black Leg" Sanji!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This humiliation defeat just proves how hopeless the pair of you are!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Aren't you going to try blooming more limbs?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hehehe-o ID love to see if a flower can survive in this sea of flames!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Ahh!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: I let my guard down!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Why don't you ask that Gashadokuro* friend to help you put out the fire?

dialogue.speaker: Robin
dialogue.text: Black Maria-San, you keep saying moronic things...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If I were you, I would make myself scarce!! YOHOHO!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What are you going to do now, Devil Child?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: It's like I said earlier!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You're nothing but dead weight for your crew!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: All those big shots know you're helpless!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The only thing of value about you is your mind!! You may as well not have limbs, no one needs your help!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's a move that helps in a pinch!! A special punch!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Wouldn't a slap suffice?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Not if your opponent is going for the kill! It's got to at least be a palm strike!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You just need to focus here and Wham!!

dialogue.speaker: Black Maria
dialogue.text: I could teach you Ryusoken* instead, Robin!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Don't pressure her! Robin's already plenty strong with all her dislocation techniques.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But we're worried! We want to help keep her safe after she leaves too!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I just told you she's strong enough, didn't I? &

summary: This part advances the Wano / Onigashima War through 34 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on battle momentum, shifting alliances, and character resolve.
